description_long: This crustacean features a robust, segmented exoskeleton with a dark blue to black coloration accented by golden-brown highlights along the joints and edges. Its body is divided into a broad cephalothorax and a curled, segmented abdomen, both armored with pronounced ridges and spines. The creature has two prominent claws at the front, each with sharp pincers, and several jointed walking legs that are spiny and end in pointed tips. Two long, thin antennae extend from the head, and small, rounded eyes are positioned on short stalks. The surface appears hard and slightly rough, with a matte to semi-glossy finish that catches light on the raised segments. Overall, the crustacean resembles a lobster or crayfish, with a formidable, armored appearance suitable for both aquatic and urban food contexts.
description: A dark blue, heavily armored crustacean with golden-brown highlights, large claws, spiny legs, and long antennae.
description_view_0: Front view showing the head, both claws, and the forward-facing antennae.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the segmented body, curled tail, and the arrangement of legs and claws.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded, segmented abdomen and the symmetry of the body.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the claws, legs, and tail curvature.
